title: Fix security/index.ts: next() outside try-block, sanitize on output only
description: src/security/index.ts:84: `try { checkRateLimit(ip); next(); } catch (error) { _res.status(429) }` — if next() throws, error mis-classified as 429. Move next() outside try-block. Also: src/security/index.ts:192-206 sanitizeValue runs escapeHtml on all string values (corrupts JSON inside object values). Sanitize only on output rendering, not on input.
validation: Read src/security/index.ts. Confirm next() outside try-block, sanitize on output not input.
